segments.text: First I'll speak in English language and then in Hindi.
Today long time back Christ was born, you all know the story of His birth
and of all the sufferings he had to go through.
He is one who has given us a model affair, Sahaja Yoga
for him didn't live by himself in no way
but lived with others working out the Agnya Chakra
You may be divine
you maybe very powerful
But this world is so cruel that they don't understand spirituality.
They do not understand the spiritual greatness,
Not only but there are many factors which attack spirituality
and have always done it
Every saint has suffered a lot
But I think Christ has suffered the most.
As you know, He was endowed with all powers of Shri Ganesha as he is the reincarnation
for Shri Ganesh . The first one in them were his innocence and eternal child we should
say that they couldn't understand the cruelty or hypocrisy of this stupid world
Still, if you understand what can do about it.
But with great courage he took birth in the country where people had no idea of spirituality
I have read a book saying that He came to Kashmir and met one my forefathers Shalivana
It's very interesting because it is all in Sanskrit and the writer perhaps did not know
Sanskrit, so he has given everything in Sanskrit language which isn't very congenial I am
sure to Western people.
Thank God that He didn' t know Sanskrit otherwise would have been dangerous.
It's written in that, that he asked Christ why have you come to India.
So He said this is My country and That' s Why I've come here where people respect spirituality
but i live among the People who do not understand spirituality at all
His conversation with Him was very interesting because Shalivana said
there is more reason that you should go back to your country and teach them Nirmala Tattvam.
That's the principle of purification."
Went back after three-and half years he was crucified
I personally think,
The big difference between the western execution and Indian is that, in the West killing
Is a very great profession.
With slightest pretext they kill people
Anybody who's saint was killed or
They call him a madcap
This is the best way to avoid spirituality, while in India if a saint says anything then
he's not challenged never but they believe it.
Because He' s Saint and much higher personality than we are though there were very nasty people
around and they tortured them.
But as a whole the public, people respected that if there are false gurus normally don't
stay in this country because you know it will be found out also so many oriented
but then go to America or some foreign countries and settle down here make money
This is one of the signs, this may be why Christ was born in a very ordinary family.
He had no proper bed to sleep as child also he's all described where he slept how his
mother and father lived in a place where there were cows, it was to show that spirituality
doesn't need any luxury. Doesn' tneed any pomp or show. It is a power within,
It is a glow and the light within which shows automatically, you don't have to do anything
just show it off.
Such person doesn' t hae any sense of money or other things as possessions he was bothered
about people who were suffering physically, even the lepers and he tried to cure them.
He tried help so many people who are sick physically because at that time there was
no hospitals or doctors – his attention was drawn on those who suffered physically
Also mentally he tried to prepare them, there are so many beautiful servants on the mount.
In a way that time people were not materialistic and they listened him we can't say how
It's very important that if you are not realized soul, then it is difficult to understand spirituality.
The one who talking about spirituality and the ones listening both of them have minimum realization
So from his beautiful life that I see, we have to learn
That unless and until are realized so

if there are Baniyaha's ,they willsittogether

The thing is that the English language has been stuck on us for 300 years.
I never learnt English,
Never!
There was a small book in school also
and no one teaches English at medical college
My father used to say this is such an easy language
with so few words
there's not any need of learning
And he put me into Marathi School
Hindi language

Now no one will believe
That I have not learnt Hindi language at all
But the interest of reading
The interest to read good books
From this only Hindi language came
In the beginning my language was very
Very close with Sanskrit

Maharashtrians don't know Hindi every day.
In the Hindi language they speak,
half of it is Sanskrit and the other half is Marathi.
Understood?

is there can be a blessing in language as well
like music or art

and in this he wrote
when they went for the wedding
then there
